gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; students who clutch resumes inside branded folders line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; furthermore, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; also, students who clutch resumes inside branded folders line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, with career counselors reminding attendees to maintain eye contact, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; furthermore, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, with tech companies displaying demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, with consulting firms stacking glossy case study booklets on high tables.
